data.title: Juventus fan token JUV hits $2.78, up 165.8% in 24 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the market, Juventus fan token JUV hit $2.78, a 24-hour increase of 165.8%. 
Earlier, Tether announced a strategic acquisition of a minority stake in Juventus Club, aiming to promote Tether's future investment portfolio into the sports industry.

data.title: LBank will launch FAIR3 U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank will launch FAIR3 U-based perpetual contracts at 22:30 (SGT) on February 14, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation: Pectra network upgrade plan launched on Ethereum testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The official blog of the Ethereum Foundation announced that the Pectra network upgrade plan will be launched on the Ethereum test network. It will be launched on Holesky at epoch 115968 (05:55 Beijing time on February 25), and then on Sepolia at epoch 222464 (15:29 Beijing time on March 5). The Pectra test network client version is listed below. After the two test networks are successfully upgraded, a main network will be selected to activate the epoch. Pectra was launched after last year's Dencun upgrade. It introduces more features such as enhanced Ethereum accounts, improved validator experience, and support for L2 expansion.

data.title: Dubai's VARA Issues Warning on Meme Coin Risks
data.description: According to Odaily, the Dubai Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA) has issued a warning regarding the risks associated with meme coins. The regulatory body advises investors to avoid speculative and unregulated assets, highlighting their speculative nature, volatility, and susceptibility to market manipulation. VARA urges caution when investors encounter promises of unrealistic returns, emphasizing that such promises often indicate fraudulent activities. Meme coins issued in Dubai are required to comply with the rules enforced by VARA.

data.title: Juventus Fan Token Surges Following Tether's Strategic Acquisition
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 14, the Juventus fan token (JUV) experienced a significant surge, rising over 277% to surpass $3.85, before settling at $2.86. This increase was influenced by the news that USDT issuer Tether has strategically acquired a minority stake in Juventus Football Club.

data.title: Dubai regulator warns of Memecoin risks and stresses the need to comply with regulations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Dubai Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority (VARA) has issued a warning about the risks associated with Meme coins, warning investors not to invest in speculative and unregulated assets. The regulator said that these assets are speculative, volatile, and susceptible to market manipulation. At the same time, it urged investors to be cautious when receiving unrealistic promises of returns, and emphasized that such promises often indicate fraud. Meme coins issued from Dubai must comply with the rules enforced by VARA. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Tether Acquires Minority Stake In Juventus Football Club
data.description: According to PANews, Tether has announced the acquisition of a minority stake in Juventus Football Club. This move aims to enhance the synergy between sports and digital assets. Tether stated that this acquisition marks a significant milestone in its goal to integrate stablecoins, digital assets, and technology into everyday life.

data.title: Michael Saylor: Has discussed Bitcoin with the President of El Salvador
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor posted on the X platform that he had a wonderful discussion with Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele on the opportunities for El Salvador to benefit from global Bitcoin applications and accelerate its development.

data.title: Tether Announces Strategic Acquisition of Minority Stake in Juventus Football Club
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Tether announced the strategic acquisition of a minority stake in Juventus Football Club, one of the most successful and iconic football clubs in the world. This investment aims to promote Tether's integration of its future investment portfolio into the sports industry. This acquisition is also an important milestone in Tether's goal of integrating stablecoins, digital assets and people-oriented technologies into daily life, and is also the basis for Tether's previous initiatives in cooperation with professional sports clubs.

data.title: FTX expects to begin paying customers who did not meet the first round of asset allocation requirements in Q2
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sunil, the representative of FTX creditors, published a post on the X platform, revealing that FTX has sent email notifications to customers who have not met the requirements for the first round of asset distribution. Customers who failed to participate in the first round of distribution on February 18, 2025 include: customers whose claims are under review, customers whose claims exceed US$50,000, and customers who have not completed KYC, tax and distributor requirements. After completing the relevant requirements, these customers will be included in the subsequent distribution plan, which is expected to be carried out in the second quarter of 2025.
